---
title: ""
# page-layout: full
image: jq-mar-20.jpeg
card-style: "summary"
resources:
    - "jq-mar-20.jpeg"
---
::: {.column-page-inset}
::: {.column-page-inset-left}
# Hi!
My name is Jianqi Huang and I am an undergraduate student at the [Central University of Finance and Economics](https://www.cufe.edu.cn/). I am passionate about utilizing _Deep Learning_ and _Reinforcement Learning_ to address the **macroeconomies** and **finance** models. I am also interested in structural econometrics and empirical asset pricing.

### Random Thoughts
It can be seen [here](jianqi.github.io/RS.html)

### Public Goods
I created a resources and information collection website related to economies, called "About Econ". You can find [here](https://about-econ.jianqihuang.com/)
:::



<div class="column-margin column-container">
![](jq-mar-20.jpeg){.rounded}
</div>
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}

::: {.column-page-inset .text-center}
```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-outline-dark", href="https://twitter.com/jianqihuan" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-twitter" role='img' aria-label='Twitter'></i>
</a>

<a class="btn btn-outline-dark", href="https://github.com/jianqih" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-github" role='img' aria-label='Github'></i>
</a>


<a class="btn btn-outline-dark", href="mailto:jianqihuang@email.cufe.edu.cn" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="ai bi-envelope" role='img' aria-label='email'></i>
</a>
```
:::
